title: Maximum Product Subarray
pattern: Dynamic Programming â€” Track Both Max and Min Running Products
coreIdea: Find the contiguous subarray with the maximum product, tracking BOTH the running maximum and minimum product at each position, since a negative number can flip the smallest product into the largest (and vice versa).
recognitionCues: similar to Kadane's but for PRODUCT not sum
array may contain negative numbers and zeros, complicating simple max tracking
approach: Track curMax and curMin, both initialized to the first element. For each subsequent element, compute candidates (element, curMax*element, curMin*element); curMax becomes the max of these three, curMin becomes the min. Update global max with curMax at each step. Swap curMax/curMin before updating if element is negative (or just include all three candidates in the max/min calc).
